query: heavy lens flare sun glare washout veil photograph haze
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: lens flare overload — sun glare, washout, hexagonal flare artifacts, veiled hazy aesthetic

response.objective_caption: Bright golden and white light forms glow against a deep indigo and navy background, with concentrated luminous clusters toward the center-left and scattered cool-toned shapes filling the surrounding space, suggesting illumination passing through dense layered material.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract image created through extreme intentional blur and absent fine detail, where warm yellow-white light dissolves into glowing orbs and irregular highlights against a deep blue-violet darkness, lacking any recognizable subject and reading as a dreamlike composition of shape, luminosity, and color.
